Chicken Stir Fry

A quick and healthy chicken stir fry with fresh vegetables.

4 servings
  • 500g chicken breast, sliced
  • 2 cups broccoli florets
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 3 tbsp soy sauce
  • 1 tbsp sesame oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tbsp cornstarch
Heat sesame oil in a wok over high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic, broccoli, and bell pepper. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
Mix soy sauce with cornstarch and add to the wok. Cook until sauce thickens.
Main Course Asian
